pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Boot Maven Plugin from 2.5.5 to 3.2.2, which is required for native image support and JDK 21 compatibility.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/Main.kt.general_idea: Removed the import for io.vertx.kotlin.coroutines to eliminate dependency on the deprecated or removed coroutine integration library.
Changed main function from suspend to standard fun to align with standard JVM entry points and remove coroutine context requirement.
Configured Vert.x to use Java 21 Virtual Threads via ThreadingModel.VIRTUAL_THREAD for improved concurrency performance.

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.general_idea: Remove dependency on io.vertx.kotlin.coroutines by switching from CoroutineVerticle to AbstractVerticle.
src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.human_impl: class StompBridgeVerticle : AbstractVerticle() { override fun start() { ... } }

src/main/java/cn/mmooo/verticle/StompBri.general_idea: Update Vert.x API usage for accessing request body from getBodyAsString to body().asString().
